rationale: Y independently verifies both submit_initial/submit_update reject list prompts (stage_pool.py:951-955, 1022-1026), reproducing almost exactly the reasoning in the ground-truth inline comment about why already_submitted-gating was wrong, and further confirms via pipeline_z_image.py that DiffusionOutput lacks __getitem__ (old code would TypeError) — grounded, verified findings matching the actual APPROVE outcome. X reaches the opposite overall verdict (FOLLOW-UP REQUIRED) despite the PR being cleanly approved, labels missing tests as 'major' without matching reviewer sentiment, and its hasattr-fallback concern is left unresolved/speculative ('please confirm by grepping') rather than verified. Both lack a LATENT GAP CHECK section.
